scope.purpose: presentation-only hostile combat VFX candidates for the existing M03 Bell encounter
out_of_scope: collision, hitbox, damage, lifetime, or audio authority
task documentation, README, and distribution output

authored_record_alignment.shared_spawn: All core enemies use SpawnTelegraph(900); pack.bell.01 has a simultaneous warning before its six Drowned Pilgrims and two Bell Reeds.
authored_record_alignment.drowned_pilgrim: Every 2.2 s: warn 300 ms, then three physical Chip projectiles at -15/0/+15 degrees, speed 5.5, range 7, radius 0.12.
authored_record_alignment.bell_reed: Every 3.0 s: warn 450 ms first / 300 ms later, then six Veil Pressure projectiles from eight radial indices with one adjacent two-index gap; speed 4.5, range 9, radius 0.13.
authored_record_alignment.adjustment: The existing content registry names the Drowned Pilgrim fan and Bell Reed gap-ring telegraphs but contains no separately registered projectile-image IDs. This package therefore supplies a Pilgrim three-direction release cue and a Reed six-direction gap-ring cue; it does not invent projectile registry IDs or claim runtime wiring.

generation.source_background: flat chroma-key green followed by local alpha extraction
generation.normalization: Pillow RGBA crop-to-alpha-bounds and nearest-neighbor scale into the declared transparent runtime canvas; preview sheets use opaque checkerboards solely to display alpha.
generation.provenance: All raw chroma sources were generated during this task and copied unchanged from the default generated-images directory into source/. No external assets were used.

prompts.pack_bell_spawn_warning: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: M03 hostile spawn-warning ground-decal VFX runtime candidate, one static frame. Input images: approved Core Bell encounter enemy trio preview, only pixel density/material language. Primary request: single circular hostile spawn-warning decal for 900ms ground warning. thin broken ring pale ash-white chalk and tarnished iron nail ticks, small dark empty center. Must mean incoming enemy spawn, not healing/safety/exit/loot/interact. Scene/backdrop flat #00ff00. Style 2D overhead VFX. Lighting cold ash white/iron gray, thin hostile red-brown outer edge; no gold/violet/cyan. Constraints: no #00ff00 in the asset; no lantern/cross/doorway/treasure/loot/projectile/skull/safe-zone/friendly symbols; no text or UI; nearest-neighbor-friendly hard silhouette.
prompts.drowned_pilgrim_fan_cue: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: M03 Drowned Pilgrim hostile fan-attack VFX runtime candidate, single static cue. Input image: spawn warning only for pixel density. Primary request: oriented physical Chip fan cue for the exact three-shot 30-degree fan. Exactly three bone-white needle projectiles in a narrow forward fan, center / upper-left / upper-right, with thin dark red-brown hostile edge. No enemy, floor, impact, or fourth projectile. Represents the 300ms windup/release while preserving directions. Scene: flat #00ff00; top-down; origin bottom-center and tips up; no text, UI, or labels; hard readable silhouettes, no anti-aliased blur. No #00ff00 in the cue itself; no red/green-only signaling; no gold, cyan, lantern, cross, doorway, treasure, loot, skull, friendly, or safe-zone symbols.
prompts.bell_reed_gap_ring_cue: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: M03 Bell Reed hostile gap-ring attack VFX runtime candidate, one static cue. Input image: prior Bell Reed gap-ring attempt; correct marker geometry exactly while preserving only its small dark-fantasy violet curse-marker style. Primary request: render EXACTLY SIX small separated violet diamond-spiral curse markers on a radial ring at 12 o'clock, 1:30, 3 o'clock, 4:30, 9 o'clock, and 10:30. Leave 6 o'clock and 7:30 completely empty: one adjacent two-index gap in the eight-position Bell Reed pattern. No additional marks, particles, rings, runes, or projectiles. Flat #00ff00 background. 2D overhead combat VFX sprite; crisp separated violet diamond/spiral markers with near-black interior and thin cold violet edge; hostile Veil/Pressure, not healing/safety. No floor, enemy, weapon, character, text, UI, numerals, logo, border, glow cloud, or cast shadow; no #00ff00 in the cue; no red/green-only signaling; no gold, cyan, lantern, cross, doorway, treasure, loot, skull, friendly, or safe-zone symbols; nearest-neighbor-friendly, no anti-aliased blur.

assets.runtime_intent: Shared presentation candidate for the authored 900ms SpawnTelegraph; warning duration remains content/runtime authority.
assets.reduced_effects_requirement: Retain the broken ring, hostile red-brown edge, and actual warning timing.

assets.direction: bottom-center origin; three tips point forward at -15/0/+15 degrees
assets.runtime_intent: Presentation candidate for the authored 300ms physical fan warning/release; projectile simulation, collision, and Chip damage remain outside this package.
assets.reduced_effects_requirement: Retain all three bone-white directions and the dark red-brown hostile edge.

assets.direction: six emitted directions at 12, 1:30, 3, 4:30, 9, and 10:30; empty adjacent positions at 6 and 7:30
assets.runtime_intent: Combined directional telegraph/release candidate for the authored six-projectile Veil gap-ring; behavior, timing, collision, and Pressure damage remain outside this package.
assets.reduced_effects_requirement: Retain six separated violet markers and the one obvious adjacent two-index gap.

preview_files.note: Opaque checkerboard review sheet: spawn warning, Pilgrim cue, Bell Reed cue left to right.
Nearest-neighbor 2x version of the runtime-scale review sheet.

review_gates: Art review: check actual in-engine scale, hostile/readable separation, and that the spawn ring cannot read as safety or interactable language.
Combat review: verify real SpawnTelegraph, 300ms fan warning, and 450/300ms gap-ring warning preserve authored durations and counterplay.

Pattern review: verify the Bell Reed cue communicates exactly six emitted directions with the correct adjacent two-index gap for each rotating gap state; this still image depicts the authored initial orientation only.
Accessibility/reduced-effects review: retain shape and directional count/gap rather than relying on color alone.
Integration review: create explicit registry/runtime bindings only after asset approval; do not infer collision, damage, lifecycle, or audio from these PNGs.
license: Generated for this workspace during this task; retain raw sources and this provenance manifest with any future integration.
